info.name: HTTP Missing Security Headers
author: socketz
geeknik
g4l1t0
convisoappsec
kurohost
dawid-czarnecki
forgedhallpass
jub0bs
userdehghani
celbahraoui
info.description: This template searches for missing HTTP security headers. The impact of these missing headers can vary.

request:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: 192.168.12.192:8989
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux i686) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/134.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
Connection: close
Accept: */*
Accept-Language: en
Accept-Encoding: gzip
response:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK Connection: close Content-Length: 54382 Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Authorization,Content-Type,X-API-Key,X-CSRF-Token Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET,POST,PUT,PATCH,DELETE,OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Max-Age: 600 Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8 Date: Thu, 07 May 2026 21:47:25 GMT Apig0 Gateway

Apig0

Sign in to access the gateway

Gateway Setup

Configure once. Temporary keeps nothing on disk — persistent survives restarts.
TOTP Secret Storage
Uses the `aws` CLI. Region/profile can be stored here. Existing host IAM or CLI auth still works.
Uses the `gcloud` CLI. Set a project and optionally a service-account credential file override.
Uses the `az` CLI. Vault name is required. CLI authentication on the host may still be needed.
Uses the `op` CLI. A stored service-account token works best for unattended startup.
Advanced vault providers
Service Secret Storage
Default 8989. Port change requires restart.
First Admin Account
API Services
Finish the admin setup first. API endpoints can be added right after login from the Users page.

Create Admin

Setup is complete but no admin account exists. Create one to continue.

Apig0

Disconnected

Welcome

Select a service and stage copy/paste-ready gateway commands for your own terminal.

Available Services
Loading...
Session
Active
Status
-
User
-
Role

API Access

Select a service to begin
Pending Key Delivery
A gateway key is waiting for this user to claim once.
Use the assigned gateway key with the request generator below, then copy the command into curl, Postman, Bruno, or any client you prefer.
Waiting for an admin to create and assign a service. Once one is ready for this account, it will appear on the left ready to use.
Select a service to generate commands.
No active gateway key is assigned to this username. Command generation stays limited until an admin creates one for this user.
Key Type Standard
Key Prefix -
Key Status Missing
Method GET
Advanced Request Setup Method, token, headers, body
Command Helpers Hidden until you open them
Quick Start
Choose a service, adjust method and path, then copy a command into your client or automation tool.
Active Headers
Authorization: Bearer <paste-token>
Shell Exports
export APIG0_BASE="https://host:8989"
export APIG0_SERVICE="service"
export APIG0_TOKEN="paste-token"
Copy Targets
Copy Command
Copy Headers
Copy Auth Header
Copy Endpoint

Request Generator

Copy-ready output
No active gateway key is assigned to this account yet.
curl Generated request preview
Active request details will appear here.
Choose a service to generate a command.
https://host/openai/v1
No active AI key is assigned to this username yet.
Key Type AI
Key Prefix -
Assigned Backend -
Models All
AI Models
All models allowed for this key.
Providers
All providers allowed for this key.

Quick Start

Universal AI gateway key
curl AI gateway request 
AI key setup will appear here.

OpenAI-Compatible Snippets

Use your gateway key instead of the upstream provider key
Python SDK-compatible example 
Python snippet will appear here.
JavaScript SDK-compatible example 
JavaScript snippet will appear here.
0s
Uptime
0
Requests
0
Errors
Services

Live Requests

TimeMethodPathStatusLatencyIPUser
Waiting for requests...

Test Console

User access —
Loading...

Audit Trail

WhenUserSourceServiceRouteDecisionReason

System Storage

Storage Mode
-
Secrets Backend
-
Users Backend
-
Services
-
Save current state to disk so the gateway survives restarts
Admin-only. Wipes setup, users, services, secrets, and active sessions.

API Endpoints

After setup, add or update API endpoints and saved keys here. New enabled APIs will immediately become available in admin routing and user access settings.

New API Endpoint

Use this section to add endpoints after setup, rotate saved keys, or disable APIs without deleting them.
NameBase URLAuthRetriesSaved KeyStatusActions

User Management

Selected APIs will be available to this user.
UsernameRoleAllowed APIsCreatedActions

Gateway Tokens

Leave everything checked to follow the user’s normal access. Uncheck to scope the token tighter.
AI Gateway Scope Universal AI key settings
Pick the upstream AI service this key should use through the gateway.
Leave these blank to allow any model/provider available through the selected AI service.
NameUserScopeExpiresLast UsedStatusActions

Rate Limit Configuration

Apig0 uses a token-bucket limiter per user. The sustained limit controls the normal refill speed. The burst allowance controls how many requests can pass immediately when traffic arrives all at once.
Default (all users)
Sustained limit Requests allowed per minute over normal use. Set 0 to disable limiting.
requests/min
Burst allowance Immediate requests allowed before throttling, useful for page loads or short API fan-out.
instant requests
Per-user overrides

Upgrade to Persistent Storage

Current users, services, and settings will be saved to local files.

TOTP Secret Storage
Advanced vault providers
Service Secret Storage

User Created

Scan this QR code with an authenticator app.
curl-command: curl -X 'GET' -d '' -H 'Accept: */*' -H 'Accept-Language: en' -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux i686) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/134.0.0.0 Safari/537.36' 'https://192.168.12.192:8989'

Rate Limit Configuration

Apig0 uses a token-bucket limiter per user. The sustained limit controls the normal refill speed. The burst allowance controls how many requests can pass immediately when traffic arrives all at once.
Default (all users)
Sustained limit Requests allowed per minute over normal use. Set 0 to disable limiting.
requests/min
Burst allowance Immediate requests allowed before throttling, useful for page loads or short API fan-out.
instant requests
